decision_summary: Adopt Rows261-320 and the hybrid durable-controller, bounded ComfyUI App Mode, and optional read-only frontend-extension architecture without claiming implementation or runtime completion.
adopted_decisions: The standalone controller console is the durable multimodule application and source of orchestration truth.
ComfyUI App Mode surfaces are small workflow-specific launchers and previews that may create only unpromoted candidates.
The optional ComfyUI frontend extension is diagnostic and navigational, not promotion or durable-state authority.
All browser, App Mode, LLM, VLM, and critic actions cross typed request, authorization, receipt, durable event, projection, and independent QA or promotion boundaries.
Video routing selects an exact qualified model bundle, workflow release, and runtime lock per pass and permits only certified decoded bridges across engines.
Audio routing is event-owned and source-method aware, while AV assembly uses a rational frame, PTS, and sample clock with immutable lineage.
Localized repair preserves accepted parents and must pass target, protected, boundary, and whole-artifact QA.
Rows261-320 are additive and do not alter the completion truth or ownership of Rows001-260.
implementation_entry_rule: Begin with schemas, synthetic fixtures, durable controller contracts, fake worker adapters, and a read-only application shell. Real model-dependent execution requires the separately governed inventory, qualification, workflow release, runtime lock, certificate, and MaskFactory gates applicable to that slice.

worker_review.requested_lane: Claude Sonnet 5 through AI worker dispatcher
worker_review.issue: The preservation package is intentionally untracked, and dispatcher policy accepts only tracked scope.

next_action: Checkpoint the adopted package as its own protected integration batch, then implement the first synthetic controller and schema slice without reopening the completed FLUX.2 runtime proof or activating deferred model execution.
